title: 2024 stand-alone dental plan (SADP) data

content:
If you're looking for dental coverage for 2024, preview 2024 plans and prices. (Stand-alone dental plans offered in the Marketplace are separate dental plans that you can buy when you buy a Marketplace health plan at the same time. Learn more about dental coverage in the Marketplace.)

You can download data for 2024 stand-alone dental plans available in a given area.

  • Instructions (PDF, 163 KB)
  • 2024 stand-alone dental plan data (ZIP file, 21.7 MB)

You can also get:

  • 2024 QHP landscape data 
  • 2023 stand-alone dental plan (SADP) data

Learn more about the Affordable Care Act.
